ddls:
CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timedate" TEXT /* Exact date and time of the data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data point */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data point */,
  "day_of_year" INTEGER /* Day of the year of the data point */,
  "day_of_month" INTEGER /* Day of the month of the data point */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity" (
  "integrity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integrity check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the integrity check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data point (e.g., valid, invalid, flagged) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the integrity check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integrity check was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integrity check was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integrity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_derivatives" (
  "derivative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derived data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original data point */,
  "derivative_name" TEXT /* Name of the derived metric (e.g., daily average, monthly average) */,
  "derivative_value" REAL /* Value of the derived metric */,
  "derivative_date" TEXT /* Date of the derived metric */,
  "derivative_type" TEXT /* Type of the derived metric (e.g., average, sum, min, max) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the derived data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the derived data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derivative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_derivatives_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_time_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom time period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the custom time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the custom time period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the custom time period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the custom time period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_time_period_data" (
  "period_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom time period data point */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the custom time period */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point for the custom time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the custom time period data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the custom time period data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_time_period_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES custom_time_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_time_period_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., immediately, daily, weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., upper, lower) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_thresholds_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed or modified */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id")
)
